Zhuge Qian и«ёи‘ӣиҷ”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Qian (и«ёи‘ӣиҷ”). Subordinate of Chang Diao in an attack on Zhu Huan. Zhuge Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
